MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF S & H CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION, AGAINST METROPOLITAN COFFEE & CONCESSION, LLC AND MARK LUKIN.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Off calendar per moving party. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR #4780

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4 (Administrative Fee) is off calendar and dissolved. Case was removed from the Early Settlement Program. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Ntc And Motion To Compel Defts Answer To Form Interrogatories; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF S & H CONSTRUCTION, INC.'s Motion To Compel Defendants' Answers To Form Interrogatories And For Order Establishing Admissions Against Defendants Metropolitan Coffee & Concession And Mark Lukin is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendants' failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendants are ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's Requests For Admission are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded against Defendants, jointly and severally, in the amount of $1,160, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
